reporting_unit: millions USD - all values multiplied by 1000000 for raw dollars

company_mapping.revenue: us-gaap:Revenues in income_statement line_items. Consistent label 'Revenue' across all filings. For 10-Q: quarterly column used (3-month period). For 10-K: annual column used.
company_mapping.cogs: us-gaap:CostOfRevenue in income_statement line_items, labeled 'Cost of revenue' across all filings.
company_mapping.gross_profit: us-gaap:GrossProfit in income_statement line_items, labeled 'Gross profit' across all filings.
company_mapping.operating_income: us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss in income_statement line_items. Labeled 'Income from operations' in q1_fy24, 'Operating income' in all other filings. Same XBRL concept.
company_mapping.pretax_income: us-gaap:IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeIncomeTaxesExtraordinaryItemsNoncontrollingInterest in income_statement line_items, labeled 'Income before income tax' across all filings.
company_mapping.income_tax_expense: us-gaap:IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit in income_statement line_items, labeled 'Income tax expense' or 'Income tax expense (benefit)' across filings.
company_mapping.net_income: us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss in income_statement line_items (and confirmed as CF starting line in cash_flow line_items). Consolidated net income with no noncontrolling interest. Same basis used for CFO reconciliation.
company_mapping.interest_expense: us-gaap:InterestExpense (q1_fy24 through q4_fy24 10-K and q1_fy25) or us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating (q2_fy25 onward). Same economic concept, different XBRL tag from FY25 onward. Reported as positive in filing; normalized to negative per convention.
company_mapping.interest_income: us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest in income_statement line_items, labeled 'Interest income' across all filings.
company_mapping.sbc: us-gaap:AllocatedShareBasedCompensationExpense in q1_fy24 cash_flow line_items; us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation in all other filings cash_flow line_items. Same economic content. Also confirmed via us-gaap:AllocatedShareBasedCompensationExpense in xbrl_not_on_statement for q2_fy24, q3_fy24, q2_fy25, q2_fy26, q3_fy26.
company_mapping.dna: us-gaap:DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization in cash_flow line_items across all filings.
company_mapping.diluted_shares: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOutstanding in income_statement line_items. Pre-split filings (q1_fy24 through q1_fy25) show ~2,490M shares; multiplied by 10 to adjust for June 2024 10-for-1 stock split. Post-split filings (q2_fy25 onward) show ~24,800M shares and are used as-is.
company_mapping.diluted_eps: us-gaap:EarningsPerShareDiluted in income_statement line_items. Pre-split values divided by 10 for split adjustment.
company_mapping.cash: us-gaap:CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue in balance_sheet line_items across all filings.
company_mapping.short_term_investments: us-gaap:MarketableSecuritiesCurrent in balance_sheet line_items for all filings except q4_fy26 where the label uses nvda:MarketableSecuritiesAndEquitySecuritiesFVNI (combined marketable + equity securities current). For q4_fy26, this combined value is used as the closest equivalent to the current marketable securities balance.
company_mapping.accounts_receivable: us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent in balance_sheet line_items across all filings.
company_mapping.inventory: us-gaap:InventoryNet in balance_sheet line_items across all filings.
company_mapping.accounts_payable: us-gaap:AccountsPayableCurrent in balance_sheet line_items across all filings. Trade AP only.
company_mapping.total_assets: us-gaap:Assets in balance_sheet line_items across all filings.
company_mapping.equity: us-gaap:StockholdersEquity in balance_sheet line_items, labeled 'Total shareholders equity' across all filings. No noncontrolling interest present.
company_mapping.short_term_debt: us-gaap:DebtCurrent in balance_sheet line_items (labeled 'Short-term debt'). Zero for periods where not present: Q2 FY25 onward through Q2 FY26 (debt repaid). Returns for Q3 FY26 and Q4 FY26 as 999M. Q1 FY26 confirmed zero (no DebtCurrent in line_items or xbrl_not_on_statement).
company_mapping.long_term_debt: us-gaap:LongTermDebtNoncurrent in balance_sheet line_items, labeled 'Long-term debt' across all filings.
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities: Sum of current operating lease liability (us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent from xbrl_not_on_statement for most periods, or balance_sheet line_items where disclosed) plus non-current (us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent in balance_sheet line_items). Total confirmed against us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiability where available.
company_mapping.cfo: us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInOperatingActivities in cash_flow line_items. For Q2/Q3 10-Qs, YTD value used (cf_is_ytd: true).
company_mapping.capex: nvda:PurchasesOfPropertyAndEquipmentAndIntangibleAssets for q1_fy24 and q2_fy24; us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets for q3_fy24 onward (same economic content, includes PP&E and intangible asset purchases). Reported as negative outflows in CF. For Q2/Q3, YTD value used.
company_mapping.acquisitions: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessesNetOfCashAcquired in cash_flow line_items across all filings. For q4_fy26, an additional large acquisition (Groq) appears under us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessTwoNetOfCashAcquired = 13,000M and is included in acquisitions_groq field separately. The standard acquisitions field uses only PaymentsToAcquireBusinessesNetOfCashAcquired for consistency; see acquisitions_total for combined figure in q4_fy26.
company_mapping.rd_expense: us-gaap:ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense in income_statement line_items, labeled 'Research and development' across all filings.
company_mapping.operating_lease_current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent from xbrl_not_on_statement (most filings) or balance_sheet line_items. Used as component of operating_lease_liabilities.
company_mapping.cash_paid_for_interest: us-gaap:InterestPaidNet from cash_flow line_items. Available in 10-K filings only (q4_fy24, q4_fy25). For 10-Q periods and q4_fy26, approximated using income statement interest expense; flagged accordingly.
company_mapping.effective_tax_rate: us-gaap:EffectiveIncomeTaxRateContinuingOperations from xbrl_not_on_statement or computed as income_tax_expense / pretax_income. Used as supplemental analytical input.
company_mapping.total_employees: Not available in any filing extraction. Requires manual lookup from 10-K Item 1 Human Capital section.

stock_splits.action: NVDA executed a 10-for-1 forward stock split effective June 10, 2024. Filings through q1_fy25_10q (period ended 2024-04-28, filed pre-split) show ~2,490M diluted shares. Filings from q2_fy25_10q onward show ~24,800M shares. All pre-split periods (q1_fy24 through q1_fy25) have diluted_shares multiplied by 10 and diluted_eps divided by 10 to normalize to post-split basis.

flags.diluted_shares: Pre-split value 2,490M from q1_fy24_10q income_statement us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOutstanding, multiplied by 10 for June 2024 10-for-1 split adjustment.
flags.diluted_eps: Pre-split value 0.82 from q1_fy24_10q income_statement us-gaap:EarningsPerShareDiluted, divided by 10 for split adjustment.
flags.cash_paid_for_interest: 10-Q filing does not disclose cash paid for interest. Using income statement interest expense of 66M as approximation for Metric 21 (Unlevered FCF). Flagged as approximation.
flags.sbc: q1_fy24 cash_flow uses us-gaap:AllocatedShareBasedCompensationExpense = 735M. Note: CF comparative period values in q1_fy24 appear to duplicate current period values; current period (2023-01-30_2023-04-30) = 735M used.

flags.diluted_shares: Pre-split value 2,494M from q4_fy24_10k income_statement annual period 2023-01-30_2024-01-28, multiplied by 10 for split adjustment. Confirmed: q4_fy25_10k shows FY24 restated diluted = 24,940M.

flags.diluted_shares: Pre-split value 2,489M from q1_fy25_10q income_statement period 2024-01-29_2024-04-28 (filed before June 2024 split), multiplied by 10 for split adjustment = 24,890M. Confirmed by q2_fy25_10q which shows comparative Q1 FY25 diluted = 24,890M post-split.

flags.short_term_investments: q4_fy26_10k uses nvda:MarketableSecuritiesAndEquitySecuritiesFVNI = 51,951M as the current marketable/equity securities line on the balance sheet face. This represents a reclassification change from prior periods where current marketable securities (us-gaap:MarketableSecuritiesCurrent) and non-current equity securities were separate. The 51,951M includes both debt securities and equity securities currently held. Non-marketable equity securities (22,251M) appear as a separate non-current balance sheet line item (us-gaap:EquitySecuritiesFVNINoncurrent). Used 51,951M as short_term_investments for consistency with balance sheet presentation.
flags.acquisitions: Standard us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessesNetOfCashAcquired = 1,535M from q4_fy26_10k cash_flow annual period 2025-01-27_2026-01-25. Additional separate Groq acquisition of 13,000M disclosed under us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessTwoNetOfCashAcquired. Standard acquisitions field = -1,535M; acquisitions_groq = -13,000M; acquisitions_total = -14,535M. Metric formulas should use acquisitions_total for complete reinvestment calculation.
flags.cash_paid_for_interest: Not found in q4_fy26_10k cash_flow line_items or xbrl_not_on_statement. Searched completely: us-gaap:InterestPaidNet not present in this filing. Set to null. Flagged. Approximate with IS interest expense of 259M if needed for Metric 21.
flags.effective_tax_rate: Computed as 21383/141450 = 0.1511 from q4_fy26_10k annual IS values.
